summary: REQ-4 appears implemented by removing the "View Formulas" action from the calculator action bar and (per the provided file summary) removing formulas dialog state/UI from App.tsx. However, the diff also includes additional unrelated UI/behavior changes not requested in the BuildRequest.

hallucinated_features.description: Added/expanded marketing-style header and hero section content in the main App UI (new headings, descriptive text, feature bullets, and an illustration image).
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest only asked to remove the 'View Formulas' UI; it did not request redesigning App layout/content.

hallucinated_features.description: Implemented/changed a "Run Dev Check" handler with verification-input loading, delayed execution (setTimeout), and success/error toast notifications.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-4 only requires other actions continue to work; it does not request adding or changing dev-check behavior/toasts.

hallucinated_features.description: Updated project tracking metadata by adding new_feature_requests entries (AR-1/AR-2) marked pending.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not request changes to project_state.json or feature-request tracking.
